query:
-- 查询user_role_cities数据
SELECT urc.*, c.name as cityName
FROM user_role_cities urc
LEFT JOIN cities c ON urc.cityId = c.id
WHERE urc.userId = 526;

-- 查询partner_cities数据  
SELECT pc.*, c.name as cityName
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE pc.partnerId = 30002;
